mapper.select: /* LgsNstepChkMapper.getLgsNstepProgressDateCnt */ SELECT CASE WHEN B.CD_VAL > (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM LGS_TELECOM_IF WHERE LGS_PRCS_YN = 'N') THEN 0 ELSE (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM LGS_TELECOM_IF WHERE LGS_PRCS_YN = 'N') END CNT FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0229' AND B.ETC1 = 'NSTEP'
SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0229' AND B.ETC1 = 'PHONE'
